---
title: "Causal survival analysis (Chapter 17)"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Causal survival analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO: write survival vignette -->
<!-- Cover: causat_survival(), pooled logistic regression, survival curves -->
<!-- under intervention, competing risks, replicating Chapter 17 estimates -->
